Btw don't place erica in the backrow for this team
You want to place her front
Because this is a paralyze comp
If you have 24, use her instead of doll
It's a team that focus on disabling the opponent cards
If he can't play
You receive 0 dmg
doesnt para only disable strike cards?
Yes but it's precisely why you want to clog their hand
When they draw strike cards they can't play them and it will clog their hands so they can't draw new cards
Basically you paralyze them -> they can't properly play or draw during that turn -> paralyze again and their strike turn into illusion so it still clog their hands
Only on the 3rd turn they can properly draw
But by that time you already have killed all of them
You can also add stagnation wheel to make them unable to play skill cards

made some tests with a friend about the mulligan/bottom in friendly matchs

the cards you drop from the mulligan go to the bottom
the card at the most Right is going to be the Last card, so it's very annoying for Posses
But,
there is an action that can redistribute the order
it's a rez
the order of the cards from the mulligan wont change, but the cards from the rezurected char can go anywhere, before mulli, after, or mixed in between
hmm alright ill try it tmr
